title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Maruti Suzuki India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Maruti Suzuki India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India Capital India in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India Capital India:
Maruti Suzuki India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India Capital India!
